body:
## 테스트 커버리지 목표 달성

SWR-NF-MT-051 요구사항(>=85%) 전체 충족

| 모듈 | Before | After | 상태 |
|------|--------|-------|------|
| HnVue.Security | 91.53% | 91.53% | OK |
| HnVue.Workflow | 96.34% | 96.34% | OK |
| HnVue.Imaging | 80.4% | **88.66%** | OK |
| HnVue.Data | 71.78% | **85.64%** | OK |
| HnVue.CDBurning | 76.1% | **96.46%** | OK |

**총 테스트: 1124개, 실패: 0**
